_note: BGM loop points for seamless looping via Phaser markers (BaseScene.playBgm). Values are in seconds to 2 decimal places. When end > start, Phaser plays start..end and loops back to start — this avoids the silence gap at the physical end of the file. When both are 0, Phaser falls back to a simple file loop (may have an audible gap). Non-looping tracks (victory, game_over) always use 0/0. Measure loop points with an audio editor once the real Ninja Adventure OGG files replace the current placeholders.

_format.start: Intro end / loop-back point in seconds. Use 0 for tracks with no intro section.
_format.end: Loop end point in seconds (last sample before jumping back to start). Must be > start to activate seamless looping. Use 0 as placeholder until real audio is measured.
